result.stdout:
Description:
  A .NET tool for running tasks defined in tasks.json or tasks.yaml files

Usage:
  DotRunner [command] [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file>  Path to the tasks file (tasks.json or tasks.yaml) [default: tasks.json]
  -c, --concurrent   Enable concurrent execution of tasks [default: True]
  --version          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list        List all available tasks
  run <task>  Run a specific task
  init        Initialize a new tasks file

commands.payload:
Description:
  A .NET tool for running tasks defined in tasks.json or tasks.yaml files

Usage:
  DotRunner [command] [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file>  Path to the tasks file (tasks.json or tasks.yaml) [default: tasks.json]
  -c, --concurrent   Enable concurrent execution of tasks [default: True]
  --version          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list        List all available tasks
  run <task>  Run a specific task
  init        Initialize a new tasks file

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize a new tasks file

Usage:
  DotRunner init [options]

Options:
  --format <format>  File format (json or yaml) [default: json]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Run a specific task

Usage:
  DotRunner run <task> [options]

Arguments:
  <task>  Name of the task to run

Options:
  -f, --file <file>  Path to the tasks file (tasks.json or tasks.yaml) [default: tasks.json]
  -c, --concurrent   Enable concurrent execution of tasks [default: True]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
